prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `8dab14c2`.
codex_response:
Implemented the ARC2 package for `8dab14c2` in [__init__.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_8dab14c2/__init__.py#L1), [verifier.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_8dab14c2/verifier.py#L37), [generator.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_8dab14c2/generator.py#L80), and [notes.md](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_8dab14c2/notes.md#L1). The rule is: infer one thick horizontal bar and one thick vertical bar forming an `L`, then mirror each sparse boundary hole or adjacent protrusion to the opposite side of the same bar, swapping inside/outside status.

I discarded the Sonnet hint and kept the Opus hint only as a rough hypothesis; the Sonnet note and corrected rule are documented in [notes.md](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_8dab14c2/notes.md#L1). The generator stays close to the official family by keeping the fixed `1/8` palette, sampling all four `L` orientations with similar bar sizes/margins, and injecting sparse one-cell side defects while filtering out ambiguous cases. No new primitive was added.

Validation:
- `conda run --no-capture-output -n arc python -m arc2.shared.verify --task 8dab14c2`: 8/8 official examples passed.
- `conda run --no-capture-output -n arc python -m arc2.shared.build --task 8dab14c2 --n-examples 1000`: built [task.json](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/8dab14c2/task.json), [originals.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/8dab14c2/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/8dab14c2/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/8dab14c2/previews/preview_02.png), and [preview_03.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/8dab14c2/previews/preview_03.png).
- `./arc2_verify_generated_all.sh --task 8dab14c2`: 1000/1000 generated examples passed.

I also opened [preview_01.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/8dab14c2/previews/preview_01.png) in a terminal-side render and spot-checked generated examples from [task.json](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/8dab14c2/task.json); the samples look on-distribution.
